data.title: Homestyler Hosts AIDA Global AI Design Awards Ceremony at Milan's ADI Design Museum
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Milan hosted the Homestyler AIDA Global AI Design Awards Ceremony at the ADI Design Museum. The event gathered top professionals from the design, academic, and industry sectors to discuss the impact of AI on design. The ceremony featured discussions on the future of AI-powered design.
Frontline service for Ukrainian soldiers will be capped at two months, army chief says.

data.title: Crédit Agricole Assurances: Record quarter marked by climate events
data.description: Announcement from Paris on April 30, 2026: Recent data indicates significant economic growth, with GDP increasing by 4.5% compared to the previous year. Unemployment rates have declined to 3.2%, showcasing a positive trend in job opportunities. Additionally, the stock market has rallied, with the CAC 40 index reaching a record high of 7,500 points. This growth is attributed to increased consumer spending and successful government policies. Paris continues to be a thriving hub for business and investment, attracting both local and international investors. Furthermore, efforts to combat climate change have shown progress, with a 20% reduction in carbon emissions reported. Overall, these developments reflect a promising outlook for the economy and the environment in Paris.

data.title: Leading the AI Wave: E&R Brings Next-Gen Laser and Plasma Tech to SEMICON SEA 2026
data.description: Kaohsiung - On April 30, 2026, E&R Engineering (8027.TW) announced plans to exhibit cutting-edge laser and plasma technologies at the upcoming SEMICON Southeast Asia 2026 event. Focusing on addressing key needs in artificial intelligence, computational process optimization, and advanced manufacturing, E&R has collaborated with Horng Terng Automation (HTA) to showcase their solutions. The event is expected to attract a large audience, with a significant number of attendees interested in the latest advancements in semiconductor manufacturing.

data.title: Paratus Energy: Publication of the 2025 Annual Report
data.description: In Bermuda on April 30, 2026, a company called Paratus Energy Services Ltd. (OSLO: PLSV) released its 2025 Annual Report. The report, accessible in PDF and XHTML versions, contains important information for stakeholders.

data.title: Resolutions of the General Ordinary Shareholders‘ Meeting of INVL Baltic Farmland
data.description: Decisions were made at the General Ordinary Shareholders' Meeting of INVL Baltic Farmland on April 30, 2026. Key resolutions and outcomes were reached during the meeting.

data.title: Regarding approval of dividend allocation of INVL Baltic Farmland for the year 2025
data.description: On April 30, 2026, the public joint stock company INVL Baltic Farmland held its Annual General Shareholders Meeting where it was decided to distribute a dividend of EUR 0.12 per share for the year 2025. This amounts to a total allocation of EUR 387,000 for dividends.

data.title: BC.GAME Esports Signs Mongolian CS2 Rifler Senzu
data.description: In Belize City, Belize, BC.GAME Esports recently revealed the addition of Azbayar "Senzu" Munkhbold to their active roster. The 19-year-old Mongolian Counter-Strike 2 player, known for his rifle skills, is on loan from The MongolZ. Senzu, a rising talent in Mongolia's esports scene, is generating significant attention for his gameplay.
